proof: function[T0: Group, T1](x0: T0, x1: T1) { trivial_act[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x1 }[G, X](G.1, x)
function[T0, T1: Group](x0: (T1, T0) -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { x0(T1.1, x1) = x1 } = action_identity_constraint[T1, T0](x0) }[X, G](trivial_act[G, X])
let w0: X satisfy { trivial_act(G.1, w0) != w0 }
function[T0: Group, T1](x0: T0, x1: T1) { trivial_act[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x1 }[G, X](G.1, w0)
function[T0: Group, T1](x0: T0, x1: T1) { trivial_act[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x1 }[G, X](g * h, x)
function[T0: Group, T1](x0: T0, x1: T1) { trivial_act[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x1 }[G, X](h, x)
function[T0: Group, T1](x0: T0, x1: T1) { trivial_act[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x1 }[G, X](g, trivial_act(h, x))
function[T0: Group, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T1) { x0(x1, x0(x2, x3)) = x0(x1 * x2, x3) } = action_mul_constraint[T0, T1](x0) }[G, X](trivial_act[G, X])
let w0: G satisfy { exists(k0: G, k1: X) { trivial_act(w0, trivial_act(k0, k1)) != trivial_act(w0 * k0, k1) } }
let w1: G satisfy { exists(k2: X) { trivial_act(w0, trivial_act(w1, k2)) != trivial_act(w0 * w1, k2) } }
let w2: X satisfy { trivial_act(w0, trivial_act(w1, w2)) != trivial_act(w0 * w1, w2) }
let w3: G satisfy { exists(k3: X) { trivial_act(w0, trivial_act(w3, k3)) != trivial_act(w0 * w3, k3) } }
let w4: X satisfy { trivial_act(w0, trivial_act(w3, w4)) != trivial_act(w0 * w3, w4) }
let w5: X satisfy { trivial_act(w0, trivial_act(w3, w5)) != trivial_act(w0 * w3, w5) }
function(x0: G, x1: G, x2: X) { trivial_act(x0, trivial_act(x1, x2)) = x2 }(w0, w3, w5)
function[T0: Group, T1](x0: T0, x1: T1) { trivial_act[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x1 }[G, X](w0 * w3, w5)
function[T0: Group, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { (action_mul_constraint[T0, T1](x0) and action_identity_constraint[T0, T1](x0)) = is_mul_action[T0, T1](x0) }[G, X](trivial_act[G, X])

goal: exists(k0: MulAction[G, X]) { MulAction.new[G, X](trivial_act[G, X]) = Option.some(k0) }
proof: function[T0: Group, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { not MulAction.constraint[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: MulAction[T0, T1]) { MulAction.new[T0, T1](x0) = Option.some[MulAction[T0, T1]](k0) } }[G, X](trivial_act[G, X])
function[T0: Group, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { MulAction.constraint[T0, T1](x0) = is_mul_action[T0, T1](x0) }[G, X](trivial_act[G, X])
function[T0: Group, T1] { is_mul_action[T0, T1](trivial_act[T0, T1]) }[G, X]

function[T0: Group, T1](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: (T0, T1) -> T1, x2: T0, x3: T1) { Option.some[MulAction[T0, T1]](x0) != MulAction.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.act(x2, x3) = x1(x2, x3) }[G, X](trivial_action[G, X], trivial_act[G, X], g, x)
function[T0: Group, T1] { Option.some[MulAction[T0, T1]](trivial_action[T0, T1]) = MulAction.new[T0, T1](trivial_act[T0, T1]) }[G, X]
function[T0: Group, T1](x0: T0, x1: T1) { trivial_act[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x1 }[G, X](g, x)

goal: exists(k0: G) { y = trivial_action[G, X].act(k0, x) }

proof: function(x0: X, x1: X) { x0 = x1 }(x, y)

goal: is_transitive_action[G, X](trivial_action[G, X]) = forall(x0: X, x1: X) { orbit[G, X](trivial_action[G, X], x0).contains(x1) }
proof: function[T0, T1: Group](x0: MulAction[T1, T0]) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x2 ∈ orbit[T1, T0](x0, x1) } = is_transitive_action[T1, T0](x0) }[X, G](trivial_action[G, X])
function[T0, T1: Group](x0: MulAction[T1, T0]) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x2 ∈ orbit[T1, T0](x0, x1) } = is_transitive_action[T1, T0](x0) }[X, G](trivial_action[G, X])
let w0: X satisfy { exists(k0: X) { not k0 ∈ orbit[G, X](trivial_action[G, X], w0) } }
let w1: X satisfy { not w1 ∈ orbit[G, X](trivial_action[G, X], w0) }
let w2: X satisfy { not w2 ∈ orbit[G, X](trivial_action[G, X], w0) }
function(x0: X, x1: X) { x0 = x1 }(w2, w0)
function[T0, T1: Group](x0: MulAction[T1, T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { orbit[T1, T0](x0, x1) = orbit[T1, T0](x0, x2) = x2 ∈ orbit[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[X, G](trivial_action[G, X], w0, w2)

goal: restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, H.1, x) = a.act(phi.hom(H.1), x)
proof: function[T0: Group, T1, T3: Group](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: GroupHom[T3, T0], x2: T3, x3: T1) { x0.act(x1.hom(x2), x3) = restricted_act[T3, T0, T1](x1, x0, x2, x3) }[G, X, H](a, phi, H.1, x)

goal: restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, H.1, x) = x

proof: function[T0, T1: Group](x0: (T1, T0) -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { x0(T1.1, x1) = x1 } = action_identity_constraint[T1, T0](x0) }[X, H](restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a))
let w0: X satisfy { restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, H.1, w0) != w0 }
function(x0: X) { restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, H.1, x0) = x0 }(w0)

goal: restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, h1 * h2, x) = a.act(phi.hom(h1 * h2), x)
proof: function[T0: Group, T1, T3: Group](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: GroupHom[T3, T0], x2: T3, x3: T1) { x0.act(x1.hom(x2), x3) = restricted_act[T3, T0, T1](x1, x0, x2, x3) }[G, X, H](a, phi, h1 * h2, x)

goal: restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, h2, x) = a.act(phi.hom(h2), x)
proof: function[T0: Group, T1, T3: Group](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: GroupHom[T3, T0], x2: T3, x3: T1) { x0.act(x1.hom(x2), x3) = restricted_act[T3, T0, T1](x1, x0, x2, x3) }[G, X, H](a, phi, h2, x)

goal: restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, h1, z) = a.act(phi.hom(h1), z)
proof: function[T0: Group, T1, T3: Group](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: GroupHom[T3, T0], x2: T3, x3: T1) { x0.act(x1.hom(x2), x3) = restricted_act[T3, T0, T1](x1, x0, x2, x3) }[G, X, H](a, phi, h1, z)
function[T0: Group, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T1) { x0(x1, x0(x2, x3)) = x0(x1 * x2, x3) } = action_mul_constraint[T0, T1](x0) }[H, X](restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a))
let w0: H satisfy { exists(k0: H, k1: X) { restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, w0, restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, k0, k1)) != restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, w0 * k0, k1) } }
let w1: H satisfy { exists(k2: X) { restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, w0, restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, w1, k2)) != restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, w0 * w1, k2) } }
let w2: X satisfy { restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, w0, restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, w1, w2)) != restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, w0 * w1, w2) }
let w3: H satisfy { exists(k3: X) { restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, w0, restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, w3, k3)) != restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, w0 * w3, k3) } }
let w4: X satisfy { restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, w0, restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, w3, w4)) != restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, w0 * w3, w4) }
let w5: X satisfy { restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, w0, restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, w3, w5)) != restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, w0 * w3, w5) }
function(x0: H, x1: H, x2: X) { a.act(phi.hom(x0), a.act(phi.hom(x1), x2)) = restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, x0, restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a, x1, x2)) }(w0, w3, w5)

function[T0: Group, T1, T3: Group](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: GroupHom[T3, T0], x2: T3, x3: T3, x4: T1) { x0.act(x1.hom(x2), x0.act(x1.hom(x3), x4)) = restricted_act[T3, T0, T1](x1, x0, x2 * x3, x4) }[G, X, H](a, phi, w0, w3, w5)

goal: exists(k0: MulAction[H, X]) { MulAction.new[H, X](restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a)) = Option.some(k0) }
proof: function[T0: Group, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { not MulAction.constraint[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: MulAction[T0, T1]) { MulAction.new[T0, T1](x0) = Option.some[MulAction[T0, T1]](k0) } }[H, X](restricted_act[H, G, X](phi, a))

function[T0: Group, T1, T2: Group](x0: GroupHom[T0, T2], x1: MulAction[T2, T1]) { Option.some[MulAction[T0, T1]](restricted_action[T0, T2, T1](x0, x1)) = MulAction.new[T0, T1](restricted_act[T0, T2, T1](x0, x1)) }[H, X, G](phi, a)

goal: exists(k0: H) { y = restricted_action[H, G, X](phi, a).act(k0, x) }

proof: function[T0: Group, T1, T3: Group](x0: MulAction[T0, T1], x1: GroupHom[T3, T0], x2: T3, x3: T1) { x0.act(x1.hom(x2), x3) = restricted_action[T3, T0, T1](x1, x0).act(x2, x3) }[G, X, H](a, phi, h1, x)

not forall(x0: X) { restricted_action[H, G, X](phi, a).act(h1, x0) = restricted_action[H, G, X](phi, a).act(h2, x0) } or not is_faithful_action[H, X](restricted_action[H, G, X](phi, a)) or phi.hom(h2) != phi.hom(h1)
is_faithful_action[H, X](restricted_action[H, G, X](phi, a))
phi.hom(h2) = phi.hom(h1)
let w0: X satisfy { restricted_action[H, G, X](phi, a).act(h1, w0) != restricted_action[H, G, X](phi, a).act(h2, w0) }

function[T0: Group, T1: Group, T5](x0: GroupHom[T0, T1], x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: MulAction[T1, T5], x4: T5) { x0.hom(x1) != x0.hom(x2) or restricted_action[T0, T1, T5](x0, x3).act(x1, x4) = restricted_action[T0, T1, T5](x0, x3).act(x2, x4) }[H, G, X](phi, h2, h1, a, w0)
